feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public Cloud ))) No default value maintained for op. generation for order type ybm1
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing 

Hello, I'm leaving a question because there is an error that I can't solve while practicing SAP PUBLIC CLOUD Manufacturing.

Error during conversion from planned order to production order.

When I searched for the co831 error, they told me to go into OPJG or SPRO. But as you know, there is no T-CODE like that in PUBLIC CLOUD. On a lighter note, I know only ca010203, cs010203, cr010203, co010203 

For your information, the picture below is DEFECT VALUE and only DISPLAY MODE was possible. 

Please let me know how I can apply ORDER TYPE YBM1 to my material (FERT_BDS_단팥빵).

Thank you for reading.

entry.title: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am getting the above error, How can I solve this.

Thank You.

entry.title: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am getting above error , it is in S4hana public cloud. how to solve this.

Thank You.

entry.title: Transport from Q system to P system
entry.content:
We needs to perform transfer from Q system to P system. Will this influence our production system working right now. We have basic IC working right now in production. or can you advice how to proceed partial transfer? Or is it possible to reverse advanced IC and wait for this to function properly. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Credit segment field issue in API
entry.content:
1. The API BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In it is not having credit segment field in it.
  2. What is the API for credit management master data maintenance?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: automatic replenishment task exceeding maximum qty of bin
entry.content:
Hello SAP World,

we are replenishing at bin level using automatic replenishment. We have activated replenishment for storage type. we have maintained fixed bin assignment with min and max qty at bin level.

Testing: once pick task is created and confirmed. if stock level is less than min qty,  replenishment task is getting created automatically.  But the task is getting created for full max qty. it is not calculating qty to meet the max qty.

Eg: min qty:5 pc , max qty:10 pc

stock available:2 pc

replenishment task created: 10 pc.

But it should have been created for 8 pc.

Please recommend solution.

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud: Creating roles in BP master data for supplier
entry.content:
When creating a BP master data for our supplier, there are two roles: purchasing supplier and financial supplier.

If the supplier is a software organization or an organization who provides service (non-physical products), is it necessary for us to create purchasing supplier role information for this supplier?

entry.title: BADI for Journal entry item (Changing parameter: WBSE Element)
entry.content:
Do we have any BADI available for below scenario :

Using Journal Entry app , users will create Journal entries with reference to Billing doc .(Statistical condition maintained). In item level we need to change the WBS element field value to the amount maintained in that statistical condition.

We can't find any BADI related to journal entry with changing parameter WBSE element.

we tried substitution rules too, there also we dont have wbse element as target field

 

OR do we have any other way to execute this scenario in public cloud?

FIN Cost Object Controlling SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: Is there an API to clear notated items and record advance payments in S4HANA Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts.
I want to use API to post journal entry for advance receipt.

We believe that the best way to clear general AR documents is to use "Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous)".
However, I'm not sure if you can clear the noted items using this API.

What API can I use to write off the noted items and account for the advance?

entry.title: Custom entity on public cloud RAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?

entry.title: supplier invoice workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i have an issue where  in workflow  supplier invoice got approved by person who is in purchasing department instead of accounting department and got released .

How can it be possible w/O forwarding to specific person. Is there any chance that we can check the history of the workflow who forwarded it and how is it possible in sap public cloud ...?

CAN BE INVOICE POSTED WITHOUT PO ?

entry.title: BADI availability in S4 hana public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is a requirement where WBSElement ID need to updated when the billing document posted to FI. Is there any BADI available in S4 Hana Public Cloud to meet the requirement?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility

entry.title: Some standard fields unable to find in standard form template
entry.content:
When we edit the standard form template in Adobe LiveCycle Designer, we are not able to find some standard fields that are available in Odata.

For example, the purchase requisition number in purchase order item. We cannot find the PR number in purchase delivery schedule nodes.

Please advise how can we get and display the PR number in standard PO report? Any workaround that are available in S/4HANA Cloud Pubic Edition that can extend the fields or data source?

entry.title: Park Supplier Invoice (plan for app deprecation)
entry.content:
Hello!

Does SAP have an available roadmap for apps to be deprecated?

I'm planning to use the app Park Supplier Invoice (instead of new app Create Supplier Invoice), but it has old interface and i'm afraid that SAP will deprecate it in some point.

entry.title: PO account assignment error ME066 with enhanced limits
entry.content:
We have configured a new account assignment category, which is a copy of standard account 
assignment "K" Also we have maintained entries for Enhanced Limits in configuration node 
"Define Combination of Item Categories/Account Assignment Categories" 

But still we are facing the error "Combination item category E/account assignment category * not defined"
while creating Purchase Orders. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
A company has a royalty agreement with three co-authors for a book title. These authors have different percentages in the royalty sharing. How best do we manage this in the Condition Contract? If we create three suppliers, then how do you put the condition rates in the condition contract? A condition contract in the public cloud can accept only one Royalty Recipient.

Please advise!

entry.title: Selling goods from US Company to Canada, calculate GST,PST and HST for Canada
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus

We sell goods from USA to Canada and collect GST, PST and HST based on Canada Tax Requirements. How we can achieve this in S4 Hana Public cloud ?  (currently SAP is only providing US Sales Tax even if we select Canada Customer)

Also does connection to external tax system like Avalara useful in this scenario?

Regards

Neeraj

entry.title: 在使用Clear G/L Accounting Documents Clear Vendor Invoice with Outgoing Payment 的时候，貌似不支持现有的业务需求
entry.content: 做账的时候，借：预付账款，贷：银行存款  ，但是清账的时候，无法实现，借：xx费用   贷：预付账款

entry.title: Create Customer project screen of custom field make it read only
entry.content: Hi all, In s4 Hana cloud key user Extensibility in screen 'Create Customer Project' or 'Plan Customer Project' we have created custom fields ' Currency Value' and 'Exchange Rate' are should be only make it has Read Only, this is requirement we got currently, we have used 'Adapt UI' , 'Custom fields and logic' and ' Badi' and there is no Badi for read only, the Badi is available only for validations and creation of screen Create customer project of custom field, so there is no option to find for the custom field make it read only. please if any knows this requirement tell me the procedure how do we make it field read only below the comment with screen shots, we are big thankful for who are helping on this requirement, its urgent requirement please expert person tell me the solution as soon as possible. thank you.

entry.title: I need Badi of Purchase Order change
